nasb.text: And the soldiers twisted together a crown of thorns and put it on His head, and put a purple robe on Him;

esv.text: And the soldiers twisted together a crown of thorns and put it on his head and arrayed him in a purple robe.

cnv.text: 士兵用荊棘編成冠冕，戴在他的頭上，又給他披上紫色的外袍，

ccb.text: 士兵用荆棘编成冠冕戴在祂头上，又拿紫袍给祂穿上，

csbs.text: 士兵们用荆棘编了冠冕，戴在耶稣的头上，又给他披上紫色袍子。
